news_items.headline: Kimi K2.6 is here: the open model that refuses to clock out | What LLM?
news_items.summary:
Kimi K2.6 is here: the open model that refuses to clock out | What LLM?

# Kimi K2.6 is here: the open model that refuses to clock out

By Dylan Bristot•April 21, 2026•11 min read

## TL;DR

- Moonshot AI shipped Kimi K2.6 on April 20, a 1T parameter MoE with 32B active, 262K context, and native vision through MoonViT.
- It is built to run 12+ hour sessions with 4,000+ tool calls and to coordinate swarms of up to 300 sub-agents. This is not a better chatbot. It is an engineer that does not log off.
- Benchmarks land at or above GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6 on HLE-Full with tools (54.0), BrowseC

# 阿里巴巴(09988)发布Qwen3.6-Max预览版

市场资讯 04.21 07:55

（来源：智通财经）

智通财经APP获悉，继Qwen3.6-Plus发布之后，阿里巴巴(09988)千问大模型团队分享下一代旗舰模型的早期预览版：Qwen3.6-Max-Preview相比Qwen3.6-Plus，本次预览版带来了更强的世界知识和指令遵循能力，以及在多项基准上显著提升的智能体编程表现。作为预览版，模型仍在积极迭代中，后续版本将持续优化。Qwen3.6-Max-Preview主要特性包括：相比Qwen3.6-Plus显著提升的智能体编程能力；更强的世界知识和指令遵循；更优的真实场景智能体与知识可靠性表现。

模型性能

以下展示了 Qwen3.6-Max-Preview 与主流前沿模型的评测对比。相比 Qwen3.6-Plus，预览版在智能体编程方面取得显著提升(如 SkillsBench +9.9、SciCode +10.8、NL2Repo +5.0、Terminal-Bench 2.0 +3.8)，世界知识更强(SuperGPQA +2.3、QwenChineseBench +5.3)，指令遵循也更优(ToolcallFormatIFBench +2.

news_items.headline: Bayesian Framework Enables Ethical Evaluation of Autonomous Systems
news_items.summary:
# Integrating Ethics in AI: The Bayesian SEED-SET Framework

Published: 2026-04-21T20:43:00-04:00

## Summary

Researchers from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) have developed a Bayesian framework for ethical benchmarking autonomous systems like drones. The SEED-SET framework combines objective metrics with stakeholder values to improve ethical evaluation efficiency across complex applications. It was introduced to address the lack of standardized ethical metrics and the high cost of real-world testing. The method efficiently identified test candidates aligned with stakesholder

news_items.headline: Moonshot AI Releases Kimi K2.6: Open-Source Model Matches Opus 4.6 on SWE-Bench and Orchestrates 300-Agent Swarms
news_items.summary:
Moonshot AI Releases Kimi K2.6: Open-Source Model Matches Opus 4.6 on SWE-Bench and Orchestrates 300-Agent Swarms

- AI
- Open Source
- Machine Learning
- China

By [Noqta Team](https://noqta.tn/en/authors/noqta-team)· April 21, 2026

---

Loading the [Text to Speech](https://elevenlabs.io/text-to-speech) Audio Player...

Beijing-based Moonshot AI has released Kimi K2.6, a one-trillion-parameter open-weights model that dethrones every frontier lab on Humanity's Last Exam with tools and narrowly beats GPT-5.4 on SWE-Bench Pro. Announced on April 20, 2026, the model ships under a Modified MIT Li

news_items.headline: Kimi K2.6 发布并开源 代码及Agent 集群能力全面提升_搜狐网
news_items.summary:
Kimi K2.6 发布并开源 代码及Agent 集群能力全面提升_搜狐网

## Kimi K2.6 发布并开源 代码及Agent 集群能力全面提升

来源：滚动播报

月之暗面Kimi发布并开源 Kimi K2.6 模型，通用Agent、代码、视觉理解等综合能力全面提升，在多个基准测试优于或持平 GPT-5.4、Claude Opus 4.6 和 Gemini 3.1 Pro等闭源模型。Kimi K2.6长程编码能力得到显著提升，在测试中可不间断编码13小时，编写或修改超过4000行代码。同时大幅增强了Agent自主化执行能力，由 K2.6 模型驱动的Agent集群架构迎来大升级，支持300个子Agent并行完成4000个协作步骤，实现更大规模的并行化。针对高负载工作流与OpenClaw、Hermes Agent等主动式Agent框架，K2.6具备自动化任务处理能力，支持长达5天的持续自主运行。

# Loop raises $95m Series C to power supply chain AI

Published: 2026-04-20T13:57:58+00:00
Author: jhaxell

## Summary

Loop, a verticalized AI platform for logistics and supply chains, has raised $95m in a Series C funding round to expand its platform across a wider set of enterprise use cases and deepen its engineering capabilities. The round was led by Valor Equity Partners and the Valor Atreides AI Fund, with additional backing from 8VC, Founders Fund, Index Ventures, J.P. Morgan Growth Equity Partners, and Tao Capital Partners. Proceeds will be used to develop Loop's product and engineeri

news_items.headline: Loop Secures $95M Series C to Scale Verticalized AI Platform for Logistics
news_items.summary:
# Loop Secures $95M Series C to Scale Verticalized AI Platform

Published: 2026-04-20T05:12:03+00:00
Author: Joseph D'Souza

## Summary

San Francisco-based Loop, a full-stack verticalized AI platform for logistics and supply chains, has secured a $95 million Series C round led by Valor Equity Partners and the Valor Atreides AI Fund. The money will fund team expansion, deeper product and engineering capabilities, and scaling of Loop’s DUX model family across ERP, TMS, WMS, and order management integrations. Published: 2026-04-21T21:08:38+00:00

## Summary

The White House has released a national legislative framework urging Congress to preempt state-level artificial intelligence (AI) laws that it believes are overly burdensome and inconsistent. Author: Ana Maria Constantin

## Summary

Google is partnering with Broadcom, MediaTek, Marvell, and Intel to challenge Nvidia in the AI industry's most diversified custom chip supply chain. The strategy involves four design partners, with the Ironwood TPU now shipping in the millions to TPU v8 chips at TSMC 2nm in late 2027.
